output.answer: Jan Koum (after the initial acquisition by Facebook, he was the CEO of WhatsApp until 2018, then became the chairman of the company. However, the current CEO of WhatsApp under Meta is currently Michael S. O'Reilly as the head of the WhatsApp team.
output.formatted:
Jan Koum (after the initial acquisition by Facebook, he was the CEO of WhatsApp until 2018, then became the chairman of the company. However, the current CEO of WhatsApp under Meta is currently Michael S. O'Reilly as the head of the WhatsApp team.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?ceo WHERE {
  wd:Q49375 wdt:P161 ?ceo
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
